name: Vista Gold Corp.
description: Vista Gold Corp. is a gold project developer focused on the advancement of its 100%-owned Mt Todd gold project located in the Northern Territory, Australia. Mt Todd is the largest undeveloped gold project in Australia and is situated in a premier mining jurisdiction with existing infrastructure. The company is dedicated to maximizing shareholder value through the responsible development of Mt Todd, leveraging its significant mineral resources and reserves. Vista Gold maintains a strong balance sheet and continues to evaluate strategic opportunities to enhance the project's value while adhering to high environmental and social standards.
